_about: Ledger of relocated (grown) name strings: each entry records the new allocation (pool/offset/ram/reserved bytes incl. the NUL) and the span it vacated. apply_idquote_fixes.py --relocate reads it to never double-allocate; the vacated spans are retired byte-exact and may only be reused via this ledger.
